_meta.title: DPH Rate Classifier — Czech VAT Rate by Transaction Category (R2B.2 REDO)
_meta.source: Act 235/2004 Sb. § 47 + Příloha č. 2 (services) + Příloha č. 3 (goods) + § 71i (books exemption)
_meta.note: Covers ~80 typical transaction types for AI-assisted DPH rate suggestion. REDO: Removed 4 incorrect '0% rate' book entries. Replaced with correct § 71i exempt-with-deduction treatment. Corrected all Příloha 1→3 references for goods. Corrected Příloha 5/6 PDP attribution.
errors_corrected: H-V14-001: Removed rate=0 entries for Printed books, E-books, Audiobooks, Newspapers — replaced with treatment=exempt-with-deduction per § 71i or 12% per Příloha č. 3
H-V14-003: Corrected all 'Příloha č. 1' goods references to 'Příloha č. 3'
H-V14-002: Corrected PDP legal_ref from 'Příloha 5' to 'Příloha 6' for emission allowances and mobiles

rates.note: No 0% / nulová sazba exists in § 47. Books use § 71i exempt-with-deduction mechanism.

rate_classifier.category: Mobile phone handsets (retail B2C or B2B below 100,000 CZK)
rate_classifier.note: For B2B batches above 100,000 CZK between plátci: PDP applies under § 92c + Příloha č. 6 item 2

rate_classifier.category: Mobile phone handsets (B2B batch >100,000 CZK, plátce-to-plátce)
rate_classifier.basis: Standard rate; PDP mechanism applies — buyer self-assesses
rate_classifier.note: Rate is 21% but invoiced without DPH under PDP. KH: supplier A1, buyer B1.

rate_classifier.category: Telecommunications — fixed and mobile services (retail B2B/B2C)
rate_classifier.note: Wholesale telecom services between plátci may be subject to PDP under § 92c + Příloha č. 6 item 6

rate_classifier.basis: Standard — explicitly excluded from reduced-rate catering
Standard — energy supply (not residential heating fuel)

rate_classifier.category: Transport — freight and logistics (road, rail, air)

rate_classifier.legal_ref: Příloha č. 2 Act 235/2004; § 47 odst. 1 písm. b)

rate_classifier.basis: Reduced — stravovací služby in Příloha č. 2
Reduced — food product rate per Příloha č. 3
Reduced — food/drink in Příloha č. 3 and/or Příloha č. 2

rate_classifier.category: Grocery food — bread, dairy, meat, vegetables
Public transport — urban and suburban (bus, tram, metro, train)
rate_classifier.basis: Reduced — Příloha č. 2 regular collective transport (CZ-CPA 49)

rate_classifier.category: Shoe repair and minor clothing repair
Fitness centres and sports facility entry

rate_classifier.note: PDP applies for plátce-to-plátce construction under § 92e. Rate is 21% for plátce-to-neplátce.

rate_classifier.legal_ref: Příloha č. 3 Act 235/2004; § 47 odst. 1 písm. b)
rate_classifier.note: Excludes publications where advertising > 50% of content, or exclusively/predominantly musical audio or audiovisual

rate_classifier.basis: Osvobozeno od daně s nárokem na odpočet — not a rate under § 47
rate_classifier.note: Economic effect = 0% output DPH + full input DPH deduction retained. Legal mechanism is exemption under § 71i, NOT nulová sazba. DAP: řádek 26. CN 4901.

rate_classifier.basis: Osvobozeno od daně s nárokem na odpočet — not a rate under § 47
rate_classifier.note: Defined as electronic version of publications covered by § 71i odst. 1 definition.

rate_classifier.basis: Osvobozeno od daně s nárokem na odpočet — not a rate under § 47
rate_classifier.note: Audio recording of book content — 'zvukový záznam přednesu jejich obsahu' per § 71i odst. 1.

rate_classifier.category: Financial services — loans, deposits, currency exchange
rate_classifier.basis: Exempt — no DPH; no input deduction for attributable inputs

rate_classifier.note: Landlord may opt to tax if both parties are plátci — then 21% applies. Short-term rental (<48h) is taxable at 12% under Příloha č. 2.

rate_classifier.category: Transfer of older real property (>5 years from first kolaudační rozhodnutí or first use)
rate_classifier.note: 5-year clock starts from kolaudační rozhodnutí OR first use, whichever is earlier. Parties can opt to tax under § 56 odst. 6.

rate_classifier.category: Transfer of new real property (<5 years — residential)
rate_classifier.basis: Reduced — residential building, § 48 + § 47 odst. 1 písm. b)
rate_classifier.note: 12% for bytový dům / rodinný dům. Commercial/non-residential first sale: 21%.

rate_classifier.category: Transfer of new real property (<5 years — commercial/non-residential)
Export of goods to non-EU countries
Intra-EU supply of goods to VAT-registered buyer (ICD)

rate_classifier.basis: Standard rate; PDP mechanism applies between plátci (invoice without DPH, buyer self-assesses)
rate_classifier.legal_ref: § 92e Act 235/2004 — self-contained, CZ-CPA codes 41-43 as of 2015-01-01
rate_classifier.note: Rate is 21% but invoiced without DPH under PDP. KH: supplier A1, buyer B1. Plátce-to-neplátce: charge DPH at applicable rate normally.
